species.Description: Species that was imaged in this data set

sex.Description: sex of the participant as reported by the participant

handedness.Description: handedness of the participant as reported by the participant

drug_allocation.Description: experimental group the participant belonged to

Levels.1: Participants who received DMT + harmine during the meditation retreat between the pre-imaging and the post-imaging session.
Levels.2: Participants who received placebo during the meditation retreat between the pre-imaging and the post-imaging session.

condition.Description: experimental group the participant belonged to, basically identical with 'drug_allocation'

Levels.verum: Participants who received DMT + harmine during the meditation retreat between the pre-imaging and the post-imaging session.
Levels.placebo: Participants who received placebo during the meditation retreat between the pre-imaging and the post-imaging session.

retreat.Description: Describes if participants participated in the first or second meditation retreat

cohort.Description: Describes to which cohort the subjects were allocated to. Cohorts A and B participated in retreat 1, cohorts C and D participated in retreat 2.

Levels.A: Participated in Cohort A in Retreat 1, (i.e. first round of substance sessions).
Levels.B: Participated in Cohort B in Retreat 1, (i.e. second round of substance sessions).
Levels.C: Participated in Cohort C in Retreat 2, (i.e. third round of substance sessions).
Levels.D: Participated in Cohort D in Retreat 2, (i.e. fourth round of substance sessions).

meditation_hours.Description: hours of meditation practice estimated by participants prior at the timepoint of the medical screening
